name: LBMH.Services.Portal SDLC
note: Physical feedback path for LBMH.Services.Portal. LOCK: numbers here = as-is-value-stream.md = Portal-AS-IS-Value-Stream.svg = Findings/UCs in ai-use-case-playbook.md. PRIMARY metrics window 2026-06-16 to 2026-07-16 (~30d, inclusive of LBMH20-386 Dev+Prod deploy day) - adequacy 93 vs 14d=62 / 7d=35. Code-review processingTime = 30d excl-<5m median (~2.8h, n=8) - not all-PR ~63s. Deploy is Manual via deploy skill (ADO Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.Api=440, App=472, Infra=441) - not CI-on-merge. App 472 0% fail med ~74s (33/33); Api 440 0% fail med ~616s (45/45) - live ADO pull 2026-07-16. AWS Dev CFN ~293s; Prod CFN ~295s (stage=app; CFN corroboration pulled 2026-07-15). Graded pack is this JSON + as-is md/svg + playbook md only.

pipelineYaml.ciOrphanInRepo: build.yaml (trigger: main; no active definition using this file in current ADO defs)

generalInformation.metricsWindow: 2026-06-16 to 2026-07-16 (~30d) - PRIMARY (includes LBMH20-386 Dev+Prod deploy day)
generalInformation.metricsWindowSecondary: 2026-07-02 to 2026-07-16 (14d) corroboration; 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-16 (7d) too thin for review SLA
metricsSource: ADO completed PRs to main closed in window (n=24)
ADO pipeline runs defs 440 / 441 / 445 / 472 - full re-pull 2026-07-16 (finishTime in window; status=completed)
LBMH20-386 exemplar Deploy Dev+Prod 2026-07-16: App 29594/29598 + Api 29595/29599 (commit 5192cf4a, PR 9220)
AWS CloudFormation user-initiated UPDATE history (dev + prod stacks) - corroboration pulled 2026-07-15
generalInformation.deployMechanism: Cursor deploy skill → ADO pipelines_run_pipeline (440 Api / 472 App / 441 Infra). Manual per env (Dev then Prod). trigger:none in YAML. Def names: Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.Api (440), Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.App (472).

metricsSummary.prCompletionAutoPipelines: none - merge to main does not queue 440/441/445/472 (Manual reason=1 on all sampled deploy/QC runs)

app472.note: Live ADO pull 2026-07-16 for window 2026-06-16..2026-07-16. Includes LBMH20-386 Dev #29594 (~97s) + Prod #29598 (~272s). Prior lock (ending 07-15) was 31/31.

api440.awsDevCorroboration: CFN UPDATE on dev-spruce-portal-service-stack median ~293s (~4.9m) for CDK phase alone; full ADO Api includes docker/ECR (~10m total)
api440.note: Live ADO pull 2026-07-16: 45/45 succeeded in window. Includes LBMH20-386 Dev #29595 (~674s) + Prod #29599 (~835s). Prior lock (ending 07-15) was 43/43.

infrastructure441.note: No 441 runs on 2026-07-16 (LBMH20-386 used App+Api only). Prod Infra n=4 still thin; Dev n=13 usable. ADO fails can be pre-CFN (ChangeSet).

qualityCheck445.dominantFailureMode: Coverlet line coverage gate <90% on Api.Tests (build 29300: 488 passed, 87.72% line)

awsProdStack.note: Prod SSO profile prod → account 140023376801. CFN User-Initiated UPDATE cycles on app-spruce-portal-service-stack. Corroborates ADO Prod Api med ~628s (CFN ~295s is CDK/ECS portion only).

pullRequestsToMain.source: ADO completed → main (same list as Portal pullrequests?_a=completed)

nonBkohn.note: Collaborative / non-owner path - useful for 'team review' narrative

pullRequestsToMain.note: PRIMARY code-review processingTime = 30d excl-<5m median (~2.8h, n=8). All-PR med ~63s is owner-merge skew. Do not use 14d/7d for review SLA. Window rolled to include 2026-07-16.

commonFailureModes: QualityCheck 445 (30d): ~80% fail - Coverlet <90% line while tests pass (29300)
Infrastructure 441 Dev (30d): 23.1% fail - e.g. CDK ChangeSet does not exist (28327); CFN completed updates themselves show 0% fail in AWS
Deploy path depends on human memory - forgotten post-merge deploy leaves AWS behind main
asIsFindings: F1 Don't skip the written spec (Spec->Jira or Jira->Spec both OK) -> UC-1
F2 Human review ~2.8h/~3h is pretty good; optional Lore + /pre-pr-review -> UC-2
F3 No required PR checks; Sonar NOT on /deploy -> UC-4 Hard Sonar gate (Sonar + lint + >=90%) (ONLY Sonar UC)
F4 Coverlet ~87.7% blocks UC-4 Hard Sonar gate for now -> UC-3 Story AC proof (verification.md) NOW + UC-4 Phase A hygiene (not a 2nd Sonar UC)
F5 Manual post-merge deploy -> auto Dev 472/440 on merge; Prod Manual; no default 441 -> UC-5
recommendedUseCases: UC-1 Don't skip the written spec (/portal-spec) (F1)
UC-2 Lore + /pre-pr-review before Ready; humans still merge (F2)
UC-3 Story AC proof (verification.md): scoped tests that prove this story's ACs (NOT Sonar, NOT a coverage %) (F4)
UC-4 Hard Sonar gate (Sonar + lint + >=90%): hygiene then require on PR (F3,F4)
UC-5 Auto-queue Dev 472/440 on merge; Prod Manual; never default 441 (F5)

latestDeployExemplarLBMH20_386.note: Human-confirmed smoke after Dev+Prod. Proves Finding 5 path is healthy when run; still Manual (UC-5 opportunity).

custom: React + Vite + Fluent UI v9 (S3 / CloudFront)
AWS CDK (C#) - ECS, API Gateway v2, CloudFront, DynamoDB, Lambda
dotnet run -launch-profile http (local, port 5000 - not Docker Compose)
az / ADO MCP for pipeline+PR telemetry
SystemTest.yaml (system-test template; not primary CD path)

states.name: Developer's laptop

activities.name: Story analysis / Portal Jira track (optional AI)
activities.note: /portal-spec → plan → /portal-context → schema → implement → verify → /pre-pr-review. Bootcamp path for LBMH20-386; team may still use informal Jira→code.

activities.name: Local coding / implementation
activities.note: API + React SPA + optional CDK. No ADO gate on laptop.

activities.name: dotnet test (scoped / Data.Tests)
activities.note: dmares sample Data.Tests 4.3s exit 0. Full solution / npm test:ci can exit 1 (pre-existing; documented on LBMH20-386).

activities.name: npm run build (Web → Api/wwwroot)
activities.note: dmares sample 27s exit 0. Required before local API serves SPA.

activities.name: dotnet run local (http://localhost:5000)
activities.note: Real Okta + SQL on 127.0.0.1,1434/1435. Docker Compose is CI/prod scaffolding only.

states.note: Inner-loop processing ~46s for build+scoped tests+web build on sample machine. Full suite may fail for coverage / env reasons even when story scopes pass.

transitions.guard: Developer queues LBMH.Services.Portal.QualityCheck (445) - optional, not branch policy

states.name: PR

activities.name: Code review (human)
activities.note: 30d (2026-06-16..07-16): 24 PRs→main from ADO completed list. All-PR med ~63s (16/24 <5m). Excl <5m n=8: med 10177s (~2.8h) - used here. Non-bkohn med ~23h (n=6). Outliers 8764 ~146h, 9220 ~52h, 8906 ~42h.

activities.name: Optional /pre-pr-review agent gate
activities.note: Cursor orchestrated specialists; used for LBMH20-386. Not an ADO required check.

activities.name: ADO build-validation / required status checks
activities.note: No branch policies configured on repository (empty policy list). QualityCheck is not a PR gate.

states.note: PR targets main. Completion does not auto-start deploy pipelines. Code-review processingTime = 30d excl-<5m median (~2.8h).

states.name: main branch

activities.name: Post-merge CI (build.yaml)
activities.note: Repo contains build.yaml with trigger branches: [main], but no current ADO definition uses that path (defs point at Deploy/QualityCheck YAMLs). Effectively no automatic main CI in live pipelines.

activities.name: Human decide deploy package
activities.note: Per deploy skill: React-only → 472; API-only → 440; both → 472+440; CDK changes → 441. Default 'deploy' runs Dev then Prod.

states.note: main is source of truth for AWS deploys, but promotion is manual.

transitions.guard: Frontend changed OR routine App promote; awsAccount = Spruce-Next Dev|Production; deploymentColor=blue|green
API changed OR routine Api promote; awsAccount = Spruce-Next Dev|Production
CDK / infra changed (or full-stack first deploy)
Someone queues 445 for Sonar/Mend/coverage - unrelated to merge event

metrics.note: No measured automatic post-merge pipeline in window

states.name: QualityCheck (manual)

activities.name: Build-Test-Analyze (dotnet + Sonar/Mend templates)
activities.note: 30d: 15 runs, ~80% fail. Median ~669s. Dominant fail: Coverlet Api line <90% while tests pass (29300).

states.note: Side loop - not on CD path. Optional quality signal when run; usually red.

transitions.guard: Fix coverage / tests / Sonar findings then re-queue
QC was informational on a branch already merged or about to merge

activities.name: npm ci + Vite build + S3 sync (blue/green prefix)

states.note: trigger: none in YAML - Manual only. Definition Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.App. Deploy skill typical runtime ~2-3 min including queue.

states.name: Api deploy (440)

activities.name: Docker build/push ECR + CDK deploy ECS/API Gateway
activities.note: 30d (live pull 2026-07-16): 45/45 succeeded (0%). Med ~616s (~10.3m). Dev 0% (0/26, med 608s); Prod 0% (0/19, med 628s). Includes LBMH20-386 #29595/#29599. Def Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.Api. AWS Dev CFN phase alone med ~293s.

states.note: trigger: none. Definition Deploy.LBMH.Services.Portal.Api. Does not rebuild React CDN (use 472). deploy skill typical ~11 min.

activities.name: Post-prod smoke / rollback readiness
activities.note: Manual. Rollback = product revert PR + redeploy 440/472 (or 441). See a5 rollback.md for LBMH20-386 pattern.
